meaning: n.大小,尺寸,(衣服等)尺码vt.依大小排列 /n.大小/移动
examples: The jacket was the wrong size.
This jacket is just my size.
What size shoes do you take?
Both firms had one project coordinator overseeing a calling agent selling customer-relations software to medium-size businesses.
Calpers, the California pension fund 13 times that size, has just 100 money managers.
